About

Built on
precision.

Diploma graduate in Civil Engineering with practical knowledge in Quantity Surveying, BOQ preparation, and cost estimation. Trained at Indo British Academy, Hyderabad.

Previously worked at Amazon before pursuing my passion for construction, design, and building measurement.
